_comment: ElevenLabs TTS config for the Live Dashboard Play tab. Edit `api_key` with your ElevenLabs key, optionally swap `voice_id` for the voice you want, and use `character_voices` to map per-character overrides (key = character name as it appears in the engine).
_cache_note: Per-character cache at <Char>/Game init files/_tts_cache/, per-tab (play vs narrative). First click fires API + saves WAV; replays are free.
_archive_note: New audio also copied to <Char>/audio_archive/Chapter_NN/<source>_Ch_NN_<timestamp>.wav for audiobook export.

character_voices._doc: Map character display name -> ElevenLabs voice ID. The dashboard reads engine.char_name and looks it up here first; falls back to the top-level voice_id (narrator) if the slot is empty. Lookup is case-insensitive. Also read by chapter_tts.py audiobook generator.
_how_to_pick: 2. Find a voice that fits the character's personality and lineage
3. Click the voice -> the URL ends with the voice ID, OR use the Share dialog
4. Paste the voice ID into the slot below for that character
5. Save this file. Dashboard re-reads on each Speak click - no restart
character_voices._note: When chapter_tts.py parses a chapter and finds a speaker not in this dict, it aborts BEFORE firing the ElevenLabs API. Add every dialogue speaker as a slot here.

_voice_picker_url: https://elevenlabs.io/app/voice-library - copy the voice ID from the URL or the share dialog and paste it here.
